title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.851 - Report of indemnification or advance
text:
355.851.  Report of indemnification or advance. — If a corporation indemnifies or advances expenses to a director under sections 355.461 to 355.501 in connection with a proceeding by or in the right of the corporation, the corporation shall report the indemnification or advance in writing to the members with or before the notice of the next meeting of members.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
